justification: The effective wind speed U eff in the IME method accounts for the effect of turbulent diffusion in plume dissipation and can be parameterized as a function of an observable 10 m wind speed by using large-eddy simulations (LES) of synthetic plumes sampled with the instrument pixel resolution, plume mask definition, and observing time of day (Varon et al., 2018).
